global_description: A small, slender songbird with a compact body and a short tail. The male features a striking combination of black and chestnut plumage, while the female is more subdued with olive-yellow tones. The bird has a sharp, pointed beak and glossy feathers.
discriminative_attributes: Black and chestnut plumage in males

part_details.plumage: Males have black head, back, and wings with chestnut underparts; females are olive-yellow overall.
part_details.beak: Short, pointed, and slightly curved, dark gray in color.
part_details.tail: Short, slightly rounded, matching the body plumage color.
part_details.wings: Medium length, glossy black in males, olive in females.

spatial_relations: The black head transitions into a chestnut body in males.
The wings are attached to the sides of the compact body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
